title: Rotate API_SIGNING_KEY in prod before the #150 rollout
body: The #150 rollout needs a fresh `API_SIGNING_KEY` (≥32 chars) in the prod secret manager. I can't set secrets — rotate it and reply done, and I'll continue the rollout.

action.instructions: Generate a ≥32-char random key, store it as API_SIGNING_KEY in the prod secret manager, and roll it out to the API tier.

checklist.text: Store as API_SIGNING_KEY in prod secrets
Confirm rollout to all API pods

action.verification: A signed test request returns 200 with a valid signature.
